meaning: n.白嘴鸦的群居地,海豹等之穴,破旧而拥挤的住房群,贫民窟
examples: Adelie penguins at the Cape Royds rookery.
My mother and I lived in Rookery cottage, along with our servant. Peggotty.
Seen from a distance, the effect was like heat shimmer over the whole rookery.
Paddlers pass sandy beaches, protected wilderness areas where ospreys and eagles roam and a blue heron rookery with upwards of 50 nests.
During his time at the penguin rookery in the Antarctic, Mr Malkonen became increasingly fascinated with the activities of the 100, 000 or so chinstrap penguins.
